dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates perfect adherence to governance protocols, with explicit schema validation success in both the rules-context-loader and the conversation-to-aw steps. The presence of a dedicated governance loading phase ensures that architectural constraints are prioritized.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The agent shows high reasoning depth, evidenced by a completion token density of approximately 41%. The logical progression from rule loading to workflow generation indicates a strong causal link between input constraints and output architecture.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The conversation-to-aw step successfully translated conversational inputs into a structured architectural workflow. The successful schema validation of the output suggests that the agent effectively balanced user intent with the structural requirements of the system.
